creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
This branch is now (mostly) working on poudriere using pre-fetch… we agreed with Angelo Polo to upgrade to 4.0.5 (4.0.8 actually) first and then try 4.1 later.

There is still one very strange error sometimes: pre-fetch creates the tar, then immediately after the just produced files doesn't get found and the build errors out. I don't know why that happens (and especially since that happens only sometimes).

This branch could be potentially committable (or near that phase):
https://github.com/polo-language/cassandra4/pull/2

If anyone has ideas regarding the sometimes-error, feel free to chime in. :)
